steps.title: Use the defining clue
steps.content: The next sentence calls hiccups uncontrollable contractions. The blank must describe diaphragm contractions that happen without conscious control.

steps.title: Choose the matching word
steps.content: Choice A means without voluntary control, matching uncontrollable. Choice B describes benefit, not control. Choice C describes effort. Choice D describes smoothness, which does not fit hiccups. The answer is A.
